tickets.issue: Wrong size received — got small instead of medium
tickets.draft: I'm sorry about the sizing mix-up. We'll ship the correct size today and send a prepaid return label for the incorrect item. You should receive a tracking number within 24 hours.

tickets.issue: Hoodie arrived 5 days late — expected 3-day shipping
tickets.draft: I'm sorry the order arrived later than expected. I can offer 15% off your next order as an apology for the inconvenience. Your satisfaction matters to us.

tickets.issue: Wants a full refund — hoodie fit too large
tickets.draft: I understand the fit did not work out. I'll help process your return and refund once the return scan is active. Please use the prepaid label attached to this email.

tickets.issue: Asking about a 75-shirt bulk order for an event
tickets.draft: We can support a 75-shirt order and provide a quote based on sizes, timeline, and shipping location. For orders this size, we offer $22 per shirt. Please send your size breakdown and event date.

tickets.issue: Asking about hoodie fabric — is it 100% cotton?
tickets.draft: Great question! Our Built With AI Hoodie is made from an 80% cotton, 20% polyester blend for a comfortable, durable fit. Let us know if you have any other questions.

improvements: Move size chart higher on product pages to reduce sizing-related complaints.
Add a delivery expectation banner at checkout to set shipping timelines.
Create saved response templates for wrong-size and delayed-order issues.
Flag customers with repeat complaints automatically for priority handling.
